allow: Bash(git -C "/c/Users/RhettAnderson/OneDrive - Entrada Management Services/Desktop/Claude/pga-tur" add index.html)

Bash(git -C "/c/Users/RhettAnderson/OneDrive - Entrada Management Services/Desktop/Claude/pga-tur" commit -m "TIGER VISION v3: fully standalone — no Claude, PWA mobile, RANGE drill library, DEBRIEF auto-analysis, LOOP course notebook")

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CHECK="${INPUT:-$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT}"; if echo "$CHECK" | grep -q "git push"; then MSG=$(git -C /home/user/ridge-intel log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null); if echo "$MSG" | grep -qF "[approved]"; then exit 0; else echo "BLOCKED: commit message must contain [approved] to push. Amend the commit or get explicit approval."; exit 1; fi; fi'
